message.content:
1. Yes, there is a list item showing a video thumbnail. The thumbnail is a rectangular image with a brownish, textured appearance (resembling a wooden or rustic surface) and has a small circular icon (possibly a play button or lock) overlaid on it.  

2. To the LEFT of the thumbnail, there is a catalog number. The exact text is "№001".  

3. Yes, there is an amber/gold colored file size text on the right side of the row. The exact text is "51.5 MB", and the color is amber/gold.  

4. The layout of the list row from LEFT to RIGHT is:  
   - Catalog number: "№001" (white text)  
   - Video thumbnail: Rectangular brownish image with a small circular icon  
   - "YOUTUBE" label: Red text with a red dot prefix  
   - Video title: "Sunset Drive — 4K Cinematic City ..." (white text)  
   - Channel name: "Nomad Tech" (gray text)  
   - Duration: "5:42" (gray text with a clock icon)  
   - Resolution: "2160p" (white text)  
   - File size: "51.5 MB" (amber/gold text)
